failures.description: The agent failed by treating 'available' as if unavailable products could be included, planning and later using available_only=false instead of filtering to available items only.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Vacuum Cleaner, so availability is a key constraint. At index 1, the agent explicitly planned to search with available_only=false, saying it would identify the cheapest option regardless of current availability. That contradicts the user's intent before any tool output existed. The same mistaken constraint is then carried into the tool call. This is not a malformed invocation or tool-output reasoning issue; it is a misunderstanding of the requested constraint.
